title: CobblemonUtils
description: Adds different utility commands for Cobblemon!
body:
# Cobblemon Utils This is a mod meant to add utility commands for server owners.
## Features This mod has two commands and one property ``` /pokespy /pokeinsert ``` Which lets you spy on people's party/pc, and also insert pokemon into players' parties.
Both of these commands work even if the player is not currently online. The commands require:
cobblemonutils.pokespy
cobblemonutils.pokeinsert
This mod also adds the property min_perfect_ivs to use with /pokegive

## Support & Additions
You can either DM me on discord @polarplar or join my development discord and ask your questions or suggest new additions there! Also check out my other projects!

[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/7l2ScoE.png)](https://discord.gg/ckbD8vNtQC) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/bfQR7bI.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/polarbrbrb)
